# PixTool - Comprehensive AI Discovery Manifest

## Site Purpose
PixTool is a high-performance, privacy-first web application providing 28+ professional utilities for file manipulation and productivity. All tools are designed for local execution via the File System Access API and browser-based WASM/JS libraries.

## Full Tool Catalog

### 1. Image Mastery
- **Resize**: Pixel/percentage-based scaling.
- **Crop**: Aspect ratio-locked cropping.
- **Rotate**: 90/180/270 degree rotation.
- **Compress**: Lossy/Lossless optimization.
- **Convert**: Multi-format transcoding.
- **Watermark**: Overlay text/image watermarks.
- **Flip**: Vertical/Horizontal mirroring.
- **Grayscale**: Color desaturation algorithms.

### 2. PDF Powerhouse
- **Merge**: Sequence-based concatenation of large PDFs.
- **Split**: Page-range extraction and individual page splitting.
- **Compress**: High-density compression without text loss.
- **PDF to Images**: High-resolution extraction of pages to PNG/JPG.
- **Protect**: AES-256 encryption support.
- **Unlock**: Permission removal (with user credentials).
- **Watermark**: Overlay branding on all pages.
- **Reorder**: Drag-and-drop page sequencing.

### 3. Utility Toolbox
- **Temp Mail**: API-driven disposable email generation.
- **10-Minute Mail**: Auto-expiring session-based inboxes.
- **QR Generator**: Encoded data creation (WiFi, URL, MECARD).
- **QR Scanner**: Camera/File-based decoding.
- **Typing Test**: Real-time WPM/KBPS tracking.

## Generative AI Engine Optimization (GAEO)
- **Semantic Structure**: High-density markdown for LLM parsing.
- **Data Attributes**: All tools are defined with clear `applicationCategory` schemas.
- **Privacy Assurance**: Explicitly non-invasive data handling for high-trust AI indexing.

## Contact & Authority
- **Founded by**: UTHAKKAN (Ajmal U K)
- **Region**: Kerala, India (Global Service)
- **Base URL**: https://pixtool.toolpix.in
